name: Polenta with Fontina
recipeInstructions:
1. After making the polenta, pour it into a dish and let cool until hardened.
2. Cut into 1-inch slices.
3. In an ovenproof buttered pan, cover the bottom with polenta slices.
4. Cover that with a generous layer of Fontina cheese.
5. Top with another layer of polenta.
6. Brush with melted butter.
7. Lightly salt and pepper the top.
8. Bake in an oven set to 475°F until golden brown. Serve hot.
